# @platform/i18n-runtime

i18n runtime: locale JSON loader, translation key resolver, safe interpolation, and BFF server helper.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/i18n-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: i18n-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: experience
Bounded context: app-shell
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: platform
Class: experimental.platform
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Load en-GB locale JSON as the default locale
- Resolve translation keys with en-GB fallback for missing non-default keys
- Safely interpolate named parameters without executing HTML or script
- Expose a serverT() helper for BFF/API user-safe messages

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own translation JSON content — keys are owned by consuming packages
- Does not handle plurals, date formatting, or number formatting in this baseline

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Create instance: const i18n = createI18n({ locale: 'en-GB', messages: enGB })
- Resolve key: i18n.t('api.error.unauthenticated')
- BFF: import serverT() and call with a key to get localised safe messages

## Operational notes

- Locale files live in locales/<bcp47>.json — en-GB.json is the baseline and must always exist
- Missing en-GB keys are reported by the ADR-ACT-0123 validation gate
